Influencer Outreach

DM scripts and email templates for B2B and B2C influencer partnerships

Influencer Outreach

Ready-to-use DM scripts and email templates for recruiting influencers and thought leaders. Aligned with the HeyZack Brand Voice.

Outreach Strategy Overview

SegmentPlatformVoicePrimary Goal
B2B Property ManagersLinkedIn, EmailThe Helpful PeerPartnership + Case Studies
B2B HospitalityLinkedIn, EmailThe Helpful PeerBeta Testing + ROI Proof
B2C Tech ReviewersYouTube, Instagram DMThe Knowledgeable FriendHonest Reviews
B2C SustainabilityInstagram, TikTokThe Knowledgeable FriendEnergy Savings Content

B2B Influencer Outreach

Voice Guidelines (B2B)

  • Tone: Professional, data-driven, peer-to-peer
  • Target Emotions: Professional Pride, Vendor Liberation, Operational Control
  • Focus: ROI, efficiency, no vendor lock-in

LinkedIn DM Templates (B2B)

Template 1: The Peer Recognition Opener

Use When: Reaching out to property management thought leaders

Hi [Name],

I just read your piece on [specific pain point, e.g., "BMS vendor lock-in" or 
"portfolio energy efficiency"]. You nailed the frustration every property 
manager faces but nobody talks about openly.

I'm [Your Name], part of the team at HeyZack. We've built an AI-powered 
building automation platform that tackles exactly what you wrote about: 
portfolio-scale control at 95% lower cost than traditional BMS systems. 
No service contracts. No vendor lock-in. DIY installation.

We're launching on [Kickstarter/Indiegogo] in [Month] and partnering with 
industry operators like you who actually understand the problem.

Here's what we're offering launch partners:
→ Early access to the platform (test across your properties)
→ Affiliate commission (20% on referrals from your network)
→ Co-branded case study showcasing your portfolio's results

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call?

Best,
[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]
[Website Link]

Template 2: The Data-Driven Proof Angle

Use When: Targeting operators who respond to metrics

Hi [Name],

Quick question: If you could cut your portfolio's operating costs by 20-30% 
without adding headcount or signing vendor service contracts, would you want 
to see the data?

I'm [Your Name] from HeyZack. We've been working with multi-property operators 
who are exhausted by traditional BMS vendor dependencies. Our AI automation 
platform delivered 28% energy savings for a 30-building portfolio in Q3—all 
DIY-installed, no $85K per-building deployment fees.

I'd love to send you:
→ The 30-building case study (documented ROI breakdown)
→ Technical comparison: HeyZack vs. Honeywell/Johnson Controls
→ Early backer pricing (exclusive to industry partners)

Would you be open to a 20-minute call?

Looking forward,
[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]
[LinkedIn Profile Link]

Template 3: The Vendor Liberation Story

Use When: Targeting operators frustrated with legacy systems

Hi [Name],

You've been vocal about vendor lock-in in the property management space. 
I respect that—most people won't say it publicly, but every operator feels it.

Here's why I'm reaching out: HeyZack was built specifically to solve that 
problem. One dashboard for unlimited properties. DIY installation (no 
multi-month vendor projects). Open protocols (Zigbee, WiFi, Matter). If you 
want to migrate away, you can—we don't trap customers.

We're launching on [Kickstarter/Indiegogo] and looking for 10-15 industry 
partners who want to prove there's a better model.

Partnership details:
→ Test units for your portfolio (3-5 buildings to start)
→ Co-branded webinar: "[Your Name]'s Portfolio Efficiency Playbook"
→ Affiliate revenue share (20% ongoing)
→ White-label case study (we document, you approve)

No service contracts. No forced upsells. Just honest tech.

Are you in? Let's schedule 15 minutes this week.

Best,
[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]

Template 4: The Conference Speaker Invitation

Use When: Inviting thought leaders to speak on webinars/panels

Hi [Name],

I've been following your insights on [topic]. Your perspective on [specific 
point] really resonated with operators in my network.

I'm [Your Name] from HeyZack. We're hosting a virtual panel in [Month] on 
"Portfolio-Scale Automation Without Vendor Lock-In" and would love to have 
you as a featured speaker.

**Panel Details:**
→ 45-minute discussion (3-4 industry operators + our CTO)
→ Topic: How property managers are breaking free from traditional BMS costs
→ Audience: 200+ property managers, hospitality operators, facility directors
→ Format: Q&A, case studies, honest operator perspectives

We'd send you beta hardware to reference during the panel (your honest take—
if it's not good, say so).

Interested? We'd promote your participation across our network.

Cheers,
[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]

Template 5: The Hospitality Efficiency Pitch

Use When: Targeting hotel/Airbnb operators

Hi [Name],

I saw your post about [topic, e.g., "guest experience differentiation"]. 
Hospitality operators face unique challenges—energy waste during unoccupied 
periods, remote property management, guest-ready automation.

We built HeyZack for exactly this. AI-powered climate control that detects 
check-in/check-out automatically. Lighting that adjusts for occupancy. Access 
codes that generate and expire without manual input.

**Results from a 12-room boutique hotel operator:**
→ $11K annual energy savings (pre-cooling only when needed)
→ 40% reduction in guest support requests
→ Zero-touch check-in experience

Partnership offer:
→ Free hardware for 1 property (5-10 rooms)
→ Affiliate commission (20% on referrals)
→ Co-branded case study

Let's schedule 20 minutes to discuss.

Looking forward,
[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]

B2B Email Templates

Cold Email: Guest Article Pitch

Use When: Pitching industry publications

Subject: Guest Article Pitch: "How Property Managers Are Breaking Free 
from BMS Vendor Lock-In"

Hi [Editor Name],

I'm [Your Name], [Title] at HeyZack. We've been working with property 
managers frustrated by the traditional BMS vendor model—$85K installation 
fees, service contract dependencies, and zero operational control.

I'd like to pitch a guest article for [Publication Name]:

**Working Title:** "Portfolio-Scale Automation Without Vendor Hostage 
Situations: A Property Manager's Playbook"

**Angle:** How mid-market operators (10-50 properties) are using AI-powered 
DIY automation to achieve 20-30% energy savings at 95% lower cost than 
legacy BMS systems.

**What Makes This Relevant Now:**
→ Rising energy costs forcing operators to prove efficiency
→ Labor shortages making centralized control critical
→ Property management consolidation requiring scalable tech

I'd include 2-3 operator case studies, transparent cost comparisons, and 
actionable steps for operators considering alternatives.

Would this fit your editorial calendar?

Best,
[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]
[Email] | [Phone] | [Website Link]

Warm Intro Email: Mutual Connection Leverage

Use When: You have a mutual connection

Subject: [Mutual Contact] Suggested I Reach Out—Portfolio Automation Partnership

Hi [Name],

[Mutual Contact Name] mentioned you're the go-to expert on [topic]. They 
thought we should connect.

I'm [Your Name] from HeyZack. We've built an AI-powered building automation 
platform that solves the vendor lock-in problems [Mutual Contact] knows 
you've been vocal about.

**Quick context:**
→ Portfolio-scale control ($5K per building vs. $85K traditional BMS)
→ DIY installation (no multi-month vendor projects)
→ Real-time ROI tracking (28% average energy savings)

**What I'm proposing:**
→ Beta access (test across 2-3 of your properties)
→ Affiliate partnership (20% commission + exclusive pricing)
→ Co-branded case study

Would you be open to a 20-minute call next week?

Best,
[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]

B2C Influencer Outreach

Voice Guidelines (B2C)

  • Tone: Friendly, authentic, intelligent-but-not-technical
  • Target Emotions: Relief, Empowerment, Pride, Peace of Mind
  • Focus: Ease of use, real savings, honest reviews

YouTube/Instagram DM Templates (B2C)

Template 1: The “I’ve Been Watching” Opener

Use When: Reaching out to tech reviewers you follow

Hey [Name],

Been following your smart home content for a while—your breakdown of 
[specific video topic] was spot-on. You nailed the fragmentation problem 
nobody else talks about honestly.

I'm [Your Name] from HeyZack. We just built what I think you've been asking 
for: one app that actually controls everything (128 products), genuine AI 
learning (not just timers), works with WiFi/Zigbee/Matter, and no monthly 
fees for core features.

We're launching on Kickstarter in [Month]. Would you be interested in an 
early review unit? No strings—honest take, even if it's critical.

If this sounds interesting, I can send you specs + beta tester feedback.

Cheers,
[Your Name]
[Website Link]

Template 2: The Product Launch Exclusive

Use When: Offering exclusive early access

Hey [Name],

Quick pitch: We're launching HeyZack on Kickstarter in [Month]—an AI-powered 
smart home system that actually learns your habits (not just follows 
schedules). One app for everything. Works with Alexa, Google, Siri. 
No subscriptions.

We're offering 5 tech YouTubers/reviewers exclusive early access before 
the campaign goes live.

**What I'm offering:**
→ Full system review unit ($800-$1,200 value)
→ 15% affiliate commission for your audience
→ Early access (2 weeks before public launch)
→ Direct line to our CTO for technical Q&A

Interested? I can ship this week. No script, no talking points—just your 
honest take.

Let me know!

[Your Name]
[Email]

Template 3: The “You’re Frustrated Too” Empathy Hook

Use When: Targeting creators who’ve complained about smart home issues

Hey [Name],

I saw your video on [topic, e.g., "smart home app fatigue"]. Dude, SAME. 
That's literally why we built HeyZack.

One app. Actually learns. Works with everything (Zigbee, WiFi, Matter). 
No monthly fees. We basically built what you described as "the smart home 
that should exist but doesn't."

We're launching on Kickstarter next month. Can I send you a review unit? 
Totally fine if you hate it—honest reviews are the point.

Let me know!

[Your Name]
[Title, HeyZack]

Template 4: The Sustainability/Energy Angle

Use When: Targeting sustainability/eco-conscious creators

Hey [Name],

Love your content on [topic]. Your audience clearly cares about 
sustainability that actually makes financial sense—not just virtue signaling.

That's what HeyZack does: AI-powered automation that cuts energy bills 
15-30% ($360-$720/year average) without requiring behavior change. Your 
HVAC optimizes itself. Lights turn off automatically. You see exactly 
where energy goes.

**What I can offer:**
→ Review unit (climate control + energy monitoring starter kit)
→ 15% affiliate commission for your audience
→ Data from your home (real energy savings, not estimates)

No pressure—just thought this aligns with what you're already talking about.

Cheers,
[Your Name]
[Website Link]

Template 5: The “MKBHD-Style” Reviewer Pitch

Use When: Targeting serious, credibility-focused tech reviewers

Hey [Name],

I've been watching your reviews since [specific milestone]. You don't do 
puff pieces—you actually test stuff and call out BS. That's why I'm 
reaching out.

HeyZack is launching on Kickstarter in [Month]. It's an AI smart home 
system that learns your patterns, controls everything from one app, works 
with all protocols, and doesn't charge monthly fees.

I want your honest take—even if it's "this sucks because X, Y, Z." Your 
audience trusts you because you're not a shill.

**Review unit offer:**
→ Full ecosystem setup ($1,200 value)
→ 2-week early access (before public launch)
→ CTO available for deep-dive technical questions
→ Affiliate link (15% commission)

No script. No approval rights. Just your honest opinion.

Let me know.

[Your Name]
[Email]

Template 6: Reddit Moderator Angle

Use When: Targeting influential Reddit community members

Hey [Name],

I saw you're a mod on r/homeautomation (and your post history shows you 
actually know what you're talking about—rare on Reddit).

I'm [Your Name] from HeyZack. We're launching a Kickstarter campaign in 
[Month] for an AI-powered smart home system. Before we go live, I want 
feedback from people who won't pull punches.

Would you be open to testing a review unit? I'm not asking for promotion—
I genuinely want to know if this solves the problems your subreddit 
complains about daily.

**What I'm offering:**
→ Full system (cameras, sensors, climate control, lighting)
→ Direct feedback channel (you → our CTO)
→ AMA opportunity on r/homeautomation if you think it's legit

No strings. If you think it sucks, say so.

Interested?

[Your Name]
[Email]

Template 7: TikTok/Reels Creator Hook

Use When: Targeting short-form content creators

Hey [Name],

Your TikTok on [specific video] had me dying. You GET the frustration.

We built HeyZack to fix literally all of that. One app. Actually learns. 
Works with everything. No subscriptions. We're launching on Kickstarter 
next month.

Would you want to make content with it?

**What I'm thinking:**
→ "Testing a $1,200 AI smart home system"
→ "Does this actually work or is it more BS?"
→ 30-day challenge: See if it learns your habits

Can send you a review unit this week + 15% affiliate link for your followers.

Let me know!

[Your Name]
[Instagram Handle]

Partnership Benefits Summary

B2B Partner Offer

BenefitDetails
Beta AccessTest across 2-5 properties
Affiliate Commission20% ongoing on referrals
Case StudyCo-branded, we document
Webinar OpportunitySpeaking slot on panel
Early Bird PricingExclusive to partners

B2C Creator Offer

BenefitDetails
Review Unit$800-$1,200 value
Affiliate Commission15% on audience purchases
Early Access2 weeks before launch
CTO AccessDirect line for Q&A
Creative FreedomNo script, honest review

Follow-Up Cadence

No Response After Initial Outreach

Day 3-4: Light bump

Hey [Name], just bubbling this up in case it got buried. No pressure—
let me know either way!

Day 7-10: Value-add follow-up

Hi [Name], wanted to share this: [relevant article/case study/video]. 
Thought you'd find it interesting given your content on [topic]. 
Still happy to send a review unit if you're interested.

Day 14: Final attempt

Last ping, promise! If timing isn't right, totally understand. 
We'll be around—feel free to reach out whenever.
